question: What is the role of chain length in SPPS difficulty?
options: Longer peptides accumulate more deletions and truncations, exponentially reducing yield
Longer peptides are always easier to purify
Chain length does not affect coupling efficiency
explanation: SPPS difficulty increases exponentially with chain length. A 30-mer with 99% efficiency per step yields ~74%, while a 50-mer yields only ~61%, making purification increasingly challenging.
